curriculum.description: Complete Embedded Systems Career Guide - From Fundamentals to Industry Expert

stages.title: Introduction to Embedded Systems
stages.subtitle: Foundation & Basics
stages.description: Learn what embedded systems are, their applications, and basic concepts

stages.title: Digital Electronics Fundamentals
stages.subtitle: Logic & Circuits
stages.description: Master digital logic, number systems, and basic electronic components

stages.title: Microprocessor Architecture
stages.subtitle: CPU Fundamentals
stages.description: Understand CPU architecture, instruction sets, and processing concepts

stages.title: Microcontroller Basics
stages.subtitle: MCU Fundamentals
stages.description: Learn microcontroller architecture, GPIO, and basic programming

stages.title: C Programming for Embedded
stages.subtitle: Programming Skills
stages.description: Master C programming specifically for embedded systems development

stages.title: GPIO and Digital I/O
stages.subtitle: Input/Output Control
stages.description: Master digital input/output operations and GPIO programming

stages.title: Timers and Interrupts
stages.subtitle: Time-Critical Operations
stages.description: Learn timer operations, interrupt handling, and real-time programming

stages.title: Communication Protocols
stages.subtitle: UART, SPI, I2C
stages.description: Master serial communication protocols for embedded systems

stages.title: ADC and Sensor Integration
stages.subtitle: Analog Interface
stages.description: Learn analog-to-digital conversion and sensor interfacing

stages.title: Memory Management
stages.subtitle: RAM, Flash, EEPROM
stages.description: Understand memory types, management, and optimization techniques

stages.title: Real-Time Operating Systems
stages.subtitle: RTOS Concepts
stages.description: Learn RTOS fundamentals, task scheduling, and multitasking

stages.title: Power Management
stages.subtitle: Low Power Design
stages.description: Master power optimization and low-power design techniques

stages.title: Debugging and Testing
stages.subtitle: Development Tools
stages.description: Learn debugging techniques, testing methodologies, and development tools

stages.title: Wireless Communication
stages.subtitle: WiFi, Bluetooth, LoRa
stages.description: Explore wireless communication protocols and IoT connectivity

stages.title: IoT Integration
stages.subtitle: Internet of Things
stages.description: Master IoT platforms, cloud connectivity, and data analytics

stages.title: Final Assessment
stages.subtitle: Industry Readiness Test
stages.description: Complete comprehensive assessment to demonstrate your embedded systems expertise
